notes: Up to 6 at $18/adult and $12/child ages 5-17 for Heritage Pass, Combination Pass, or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass. Includes 3 sites. Present e-ticket to guest services to purchase tickets at reduced rate.
raw: 508-746-1622 www.plimoth.org The e-ticket must be presented to Plimoth Patuxent Museums guest services staff upon arrival at the Museum for Thayer Public Library patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass, Combination Pass, or Plimoth Patuxent Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17. Includes admission to three sites — Plimouth Plantation (the 1627 English Village, Wampanoag Homesite, Crafts Center and Nye Barn), the Waterfront Exhibit, and the Plimouth Grist Mill. Annual membership of $500.00 provided by the Friends of Thayer Public Library. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
